Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class DataWeaveResource

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.MetadataWithContent
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.DataWeaveResource
public class DataWeaveResource extends MetadataWithContent

Java class for DataWeaveResource complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="DataWeaveResource">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}MetadataWithContent">
       <sequence>
         <element name="apiVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double"/>
         <element name="isGlobal" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isProtected" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
